info.title: Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.Packager
info.description: This .NET tool allows you to create application (.dmapp) and protocol (.dmprotocol) packages.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: This .NET tool allows you to create DataMiner application (.dmapp) and protocol (.dmprotocol) packages.

commands.name: dmapp
commands.description: Creates a DataMiner application (.dmapp) package based on the type.

commands.name: dmprotocol
commands.description: Creates a protocol package (.dmprotocol) based on a protocol solution.
